title: Resolution Strongly Recommending to the Local Chief Executive Honorable Mayor Antonio L. Kalaw to Promptly Incorporate Mitigation Measures in Relation to Philippine National Railways (PNR) Clearing Activities for the Opening of Inter-province Commuter San Pablo, Laguna to Lucena, Quezon.( AUTHORS: COUNCILOR(S) Miko C. Pelegrina; Janos S. Lapiz; Geronimo A. Ciceron; Marlo Pj A. Alipon; Mike Dexter A. Concio; Mark Lester B. Dizon; Cris Dayril B. Bagnes; Rodora P. Perez-loares; Arlene P. Delos
